name: cowork-social
description: Social media content engine for the Cowork AI OS. 13 skills: 8-phase wizard, brand brief auto-derived from business-brain.md, content coach, 6 platform draft skills (LinkedIn, Twitter, Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, Threads), post grader (hook=50%), Monday batch orchestrator, Saturday idea generator, monthly retrospective. Cowork-native rewrites of Blotato's official Claude Skills. Soft-depends on cowork-ai-os for identity files. Loose-couples with cowork-research for sibling Blotato MCP wiring.
